types.purpose: Accepted source or compiler inputs that must succeed with explicit semantic assertions.
expectedOutputs: declared artifacts and runtime-plan effects where applicable

types.purpose: Rejected input that must fail closed at a source position with stable diagnostics.
expectedOutputs: stable diagnostic IDs and essential fields

types.purpose: Direct HxcIR or C AST construction that proves structural semantics without claiming Haxe-to-C lowering.
expectedOutputs: deterministic structural dump or C/header text
strict native compile/run evidence when C is emitted

types.purpose: Reviewable expected compiler, IR, C, header, diagnostic, or manifest artifacts.
Native compile/link/run, failure-path, sanitizer, and runtime-feature behavior.
expectedOutputs: selected runtime features or explicit zero-runtime proof
strict compiler and sanitizer results where eligible

types.purpose: The same Haxe semantics compared against a declared reference target or oracle.
Headers, symbols, layouts, ownership, calling conventions, and independent consumers.
expectedOutputs: ABI manifest or explicit native-seed limitation

types.purpose: Reproducible compiler, generated-C, runtime, allocation, size, and FFI measurements.

assertions: all owned Haxe sources and macro branches type-check under Eval
production custom-target activation stops at exact source-anchored HXC1001 for the first unsupported typed call
HXC1001 leaves no generated artifact
custom-target lifecycle and platform snapshot
configuration conflicts and legacy Cross fail closed
compiler-server and package-layout isolation
production body lowering reports the first unsupported call as exact source-anchored HXC1001 without output
typed Haxe definitions match every machine-readable catalog entry
structured records are deterministic, source-positioned, profile-aware, and schema-valid
unregistered IDs, absolute paths, and disallowed severity changes fail closed
the JSON Schema and typed parser expose the same closed root keys, overlay keys, enums, and schema identity
compiler defaults, environment presets, project values, named overlays, CLI flags, and direct defines resolve in documented order with source provenance on every effective field
config-relative paths and effective reports are byte-stable across process cwd, CRLF, locale, input order, repeated cold runs, and warm compiler-server requests
unknown or duplicate keys and defines, malformed JSON/Unicode, invalid values/combinations, and path traversal fail with HXC0003 before compilation without exposing a host path
typed contract report is deterministic across order and compiler-server requests
invalid metadata and declaration graphs emit HXC5002
declaration facts have no runtime or unsafe effect
hand-authored exact externs lower through HxcIR to direct header-owned scalar including binary32 float, typedef, closed-enum, constant, and by-value struct calls without wrapper allocation

explicit Float-to-c.Float32 narrowing and exact widening preserve the documented tie, subnormal, overflow, NaN, infinity, and signed-zero behavior while generated headers assert the selected target's binary32 format
literal CString arguments borrow static C literal storage while embedded NUL and non-direct expressions fail with source-positioned HXC3000 and no artifact
compiled C11 probes verify imported size, alignment, offsets, constants, Float32 field mutation, arguments, returns, and conversion boundaries under identity-verified GCC and Clang at O0 and O2
headers and libraries appear once in the neutral build plan with source owners, generated artifacts are order/root/locale deterministic, and the runtime plan proves complete hxrt absence
callbacks, variadics, retained pointer returns, and declarations without exact C names fail closed as deliberately deferred ABI contracts
the immutable raylib 6.0 archive, full source tree, reviewed build inputs, configurations, and per-platform link facts are checksum locked
pinned-source, explicit offline-source, and exact-version system pkg-config authorities fail closed instead of silently switching provenance
generated Haxe emits deterministic strict C and five reviewable neutral build plans with exact argument-array libraries, frameworks, headers, and pkg-config facts
the checked Clang-derived raw core lock renders 7 records, 1 struct alias, 5 enum domains with 143 constants, and 54 functions byte-identically from the pinned header
an independent native probe verifies every selected layout, alias, constant, and function signature while the generated smoke consumes the public raylib.raw package
Linux, macOS, and Windows source lanes compile and link generated C against real raylib while the Linux PLATFORM_MEMORY/software lane also runs with exact output
normal compilation and post-provision builds are network-free, select no hxrt feature, and serialize no checkout, cache, or temporary path
complete typed modules, declarations, ownership, metadata, fields, and entry point are classified
normalized inventory is byte-identical across captured input order and compiler-server requests
the implementation-only report precedes body lowering, which reaches exact source-anchored HXC1001 without emitting C
two Reflaxe-owned structural renders from unrelated absolute roots are byte-identical and match the complete registered snapshot tree
the direct AST corpus covers declarations, precedence, initializers, control flow, typed GNU attributes, and a structurally guarded header/source split
the reusable argument-array harness records compiler family and version, normalized compile/link/run commands, source hashes, exit codes, stdout, and stderr without host paths
required GCC and Clang native-smoke lanes compile, link, and run every corpus project without hxrt
plan and header renders are deterministic
expected include/forward/complete decisions match
native-smoke independently compiles headers and runs their consumer
C namespaces, exact names, generated defaults, and collision provenance are structural
overloads and generic specializations are byte-identical across discovery order and contain no host paths
typed C name finalization feeds declaration planning without selecting hxrt
one typed neutral compile/link plan drives the raw manifest plus optional CMake and Meson adapters deterministically
raw-manifest, CMake, and Meson consumers compile and run both structural C AST/printer corpora with adversarial quoted paths
Reflaxe ownership removes only listed stale outputs and skips unchanged artifact writes
path traversal, build-language injection, conflicting typed build facts, symlinks, unowned collisions, malformed ownership JSON, and premature lowered-program claims fail closed
canonical HxcIR dumps preserve source-aware semantic order
invalid or unsupported IR paths, including mismatched switch subjects/cases and malformed binary32 narrowing/widening, emit HXC9000 or HXC1001
the Eval side-effect oracle matches the modeled order without claiming C execution
real pinned-compiler typed fields map fixed and ABI primitives, exact c.Float32, and scalar, reference, and native-pointer nullability identically in both profiles
the machine contract is deterministic and every primitive mapping/conversion has an empty runtime feature set

strict C11 GCC and Clang O0/O2 probes cover integer widening/narrowing, binary32 ties and exact widening, signed/unsigned bits, NaN, infinity, overflow, subnormal/underflow, negative zero, nullability, and ABI prerequisites
the independent native probe is contract evidence and is not described as Haxe-generated output
the exact pinned Haxe common and capability-gated typed API surface renders byte-identically and contains no host path
every applicable source module and public API resolves to exactly one profile, environment, runtime, diagnostic, implementation, and test owner
unowned modules, stale API overrides, unknown runtime features, missing diagnostics, and evidence-free conformant claims fail closed
the JSON authority and generated review CSV drift together through the central explicit snapshot update path
real pinned-compiler TypedExpr constants, locals, primitive blocks, and returns lower through validated HxcIR before structural C
local names are deterministic and shadowing-safe across discovery order while unsupported and synthetic unreachable nodes emit exact source-positioned HXC1001
portable and metal produce identical runtime-free strict C11 bodies with optional structured #line directives
available local and separately required GCC/Clang CI lanes compile and execute both mapped and unmapped generated-body fixtures at O0 and O2 without warnings
typed primitive parameters, left-to-right direct-call arguments, and implicit conversions are explicit in validated HxcIR

all reachable static functions receive deterministic prototypes before definitions; direct self-tail recursion uses typed temporaries and a loop while mutual cycles compile from deterministic private translation units with -Winfinite-recursion active
default, optional, and rest parameters fail with exact source-positioned HXC1001, while non-hosted executable entry remains scoped HXC1000
portable, metal, and explicit runtime-none production builds emit int main(void), analyzed empty runtime/ABI/stdlib plans, and no hxrt artifact or symbol
closed anonymous primitive records receive dependency-first named C structs, deterministic UTF-8 field order, and one structural identity across aliases and source order
object-literal operands retain Haxe source evaluation order before canonical named aggregate construction, while local field reads use explicit address and dereference HxcIR operations
by-value parameters, returns, local copies, nested records, and C11 layout assertions remain structural and runtime-free in portable, metal, and explicit runtime-none projects
identity equality, field mutation, Dynamic records, and metal packed typed-C layouts fail closed with exact source-positioned diagnostics and no plausible artifact
the reusable native harness covers GCC and Clang O0/O2 C11 execution, and paired C/C++17 consumers prove matching private-header size, alignment, offsets, construction, and copy behavior

ordinary non-generic Haxe classes receive private concrete strict-C structs with source-order own fields, a real first base subobject, and a one-byte compiler-owned anchor only for an otherwise empty root
class references are nullable pointers; derived-to-base conversion follows an inspectable nested-member address path and preserves null without pointer reinterpretation
field reads and writes require an explicit same-block HxcIR null proof before dereference, inherited fields retain their declaring storage, and reference equality compares the common base identity
every emitted layout carries structural size, alignment, offset, and non-overlap assertions; paired C and C++17 consumers agree under identity-verified GCC and Clang at O0 and O2

portable, metal, and explicit runtime-none projects remain deterministic and hxrt-free, keep the generated layout in exactly one private header, and record no public ABI exports; downcast, generic-class, and interface edges fail closed for their owning later tasks

direct unconditional local new expressions receive default-initialized automatic class storage and ordinary private C constructor functions without selecting hxrt; a target-native fixture proves static-platform integer, Boolean, floating, and reference defaults
constructor arguments, pinned-Haxe derived field initializers, super calls, base fields/bodies, and derived bodies retain exact observable order against the Eval oracle
empty zero-argument constructor chains elide their C symbols and calls only after preserving source argument evaluation
throwing constructors use explicit HxcIR status conventions and failure edges whose partial and initialized cleanup steps execute in validated reverse order
return, alias, argument, assignment, self escape, conditional construction, dependency cycles, native layouts, and generic classes fail closed with source-positioned HXC1001 and no plausible artifact
portable, metal, reversed-input, repeated, and explicit runtime-none projects are byte-identical; strict GCC and Clang O0/O2 C11 execution, fail-stop status, and a C++17 private-header consumer pass

ordinary overridable calls through a base reference use one deterministic hierarchy slot, while final methods, final receiver classes, private methods, super calls, and @:nonVirtual methods remain direct with an explicit reason

only constructed dynamic classes receive tables, only reachable virtual methods receive slots, the root alone owns the table pointer, and typed self adapters preserve exact implementation receiver types

schema-10 HxcIR retains root header intent, table binding, direct and indirect call choices, exact receiver values, and representation-identical override signatures before structural strict C emission
covariant return and contravariant argument overrides admitted by pinned Haxe fail closed at their source positions when their C representations differ, with HXC1001 and no generated artifact

schema-1 hxc.dispatch.json explains every reachable instance call and is byte-identical across repeated roots, reversed modules, locale changes, portable/metal profiles, and runtime-none policy where configuration fields do not apply
the dispatch slice selects no hxrt feature, exports no public ABI, and passes identity-verified GCC and Clang O0/O2 C11 execution plus strict C++17 private-header consumption
fieldless concrete enums use private native C enums, while payload enums use readable discriminant enums, per-constructor payload structs, payload unions, and outer value structs

closed primitive generic instances specialize deterministically under the shared E3.T03 key, reason, budget, and report contract, while recursive local values use explicit finite pointer edges without selecting runtime support
constructor evaluation, checked payload projection, and exhaustive source-ordered tag switches remain first-class validated HxcIR before structural C emission
recursive escape, reference payloads, aggregate payloads, and non-exhaustive source matches fail closed at source positions with no generated artifact

portable, metal, and explicit runtime-none production projects are deterministic and runtime-free, while GCC/Clang O0/O2 C11 and paired C/C++17 consumers prove matching tags, size, alignment, offsets, construction, and recursive layout
reachable closed generic static functions and enum values specialize by full length-prefixed semantic keys while SHA-256 is only a collision-checked compact name suffix

typedef-equivalent Int calls share one instance and merged source reasons, a two-argument key preserves ordered boundaries, distinct Bool, Int, UInt, Float, and finite same-nominal nested enum function instances remain separate, and same-key recursive discovery terminates

hxc.specializations.json records deterministic reachability, recursion, structural cost, strict-C definition bytes independently rehashed from emitted C, hard budgets, and complete generated payload bytes

Dynamic, open phantom parameters, non-stationary recursive function and type growth reaching their count budgets, and the code-size threshold fail with exact source-positioned HXC1001 and no generated artifact

isolated roots, reversed typed-module order, locale changes, repeated cold builds, portable/metal/runtime-none payloads, and a rejected warm-server request do not change generated C; a non-generic same-root replacement removes the stale specialization sidecar; available GCC and Clang compile and run strict C11 at O0 and O2

typed calls, assignments, static fields, required and skipped lazy operands, ternaries, statement conditionals, nested pre/post-test and range loops, loop jumps, switches, and UInt increments lower into explicit HxcIR instruction/block order
the indexed compound-assignment fixture proves receiver/index/address/load/right/store order before fixed-array representation is admitted
statement and value switch subjects execute once and every emitted C case/default immediately jumps to a typed target without user-observable fallthrough
every effectful load and consumed call is materialized; only total pure expressions over stable values remain inline
portable, metal, and runtime-none production C is byte-stable, warning-clean at O0/O2, runtime-free, and matches the pinned Eval oracle under GCC and Clang
the typed dependency graph records source-positioned reasons and produces dependency-first type order independently of compiler discovery order
class __init__ bodies run in type order before static fields, fields run in source order, and the hosted entry invokes the compiler-owned phase exactly once before Haxe main
deferred globals and initialize-global instructions remain inspectable in validated HxcIR while generated strict C uses zero-initialized storage plus ordered assignments
cross-type cycles fail without artifacts through deterministic HXC1002 paths naming every edge
portable, metal, and runtime-none output remains hxrt-free, warning-clean at O0/O2, and matches the pinned Haxe JavaScript generator oracle under GCC and Clang
typed Int, UInt, and Float arithmetic selects direct C or request-local program helpers without selecting hxrt
typed c.IntConvert exact and modulo operations retain their distinct HxcIR meaning and emit structural direct C for literal and dynamic values
non-contained exact conversions, signed-target modulo conversions, and helper-requiring conversions fail with exact source-positioned HXC1001 and no artifact
overflow, division, modulo, shifts, and bit operations preserve the documented boundary semantics without C undefined behavior
portable, metal, and runtime-none production builds compile and run as strict C11 under the required GCC and Clang lanes, with UBSan enabled where supported
selected helpers are static inline and disappear from optimized output while safe UInt operations remain inspectable as direct C
a checked SplitMix64 seed regenerates the same boundary-biased 128-case primitive corpus and Haxe source byte for byte

the common Int, UInt, Float-to-Int, and Boolean result domain matches pinned Haxe Eval exactly while every admitted target refinement is replayed from the closed divergence ledger and only the non-finite positive-infinity Eval Int32 observation receives its named host-dependent normalization
a deterministic mismatch reducer isolates the first failing semantic case and is locked by a stored replay fixture

checked-in generated strict C11 carries the structured whole-program no-runtime proof and runs at O0 and O2 and under combined address and undefined-behavior sanitizers in required GCC and Clang lanes without selecting hxrt
the reusable argument-array native harness records normalized compiler, command, input-hash, exit, stdout, and stderr evidence without host paths

typed nonempty CArray literals and positive compiler-known CArray.zero products lower to structural automatic C arrays, with zero storage emitted as a C11 aggregate initializer and no allocation or memset

the shared fixed-array policy admits exact-size integer, binary32, or binary64 elements up to 65536 bytes per zero-initialized array and rejects invalid, unknown, overflowing, over-budget, or unsupported storage at exact source spans

Span or ConstSpan borrows lower to typed pointer-and-length views without iterator objects; reached direct static parameters and nested forwarding retain one semantic HxcIR span argument plus an explicit callee borrow while strict C11 receives correctly qualified pointer-and-size_t parameters with no wrapper

compile-time and loop-guarded bounds proofs remain explicit in schema-10 HxcIR, statically out-of-range indexes fail before C emission, and dynamic local or parameter indexing emits a signed and size_t fail-stop check against the exact local or forwarded element count in every profile and build mode

ordinary-Haxe 32 by 16 by 32 linearization, repeated UInt8 mutation, and exact-width span iteration compile to element-scaled guarded access whose generated C is byte-identical across profile and build mode

borrowed returns, field or global storage, instance or virtual dispatch, callbacks, recursion, and other language-level span escapes fail with source-positioned HXC1001, while exported or native ABI boundaries fail with source-positioned HXC3000; neither family leaves a plausible artifact

portable and metal runtime-none projects carry a structured reachable-program proof and compile and execute as strict C11 under required GCC and Clang O0, O2, and sanitizer lanes with no allocation or hxrt artifact, include, library, or symbol
an unreachable String-typed declaration is present in typed input but absent from reachable HxcIR, generated symbols, runtime roots, and output
the typed registry validates stable IDs, is byte-identical across discovery order, and rejects unknown or cyclic dependencies with canonical HXC9000 evidence
every root and transitive selected feature retains source-reason IDs while manual constraints cannot add unused code or remove required dependencies

auto, minimal, none, availability, environment, native-only, and reserved-feature policy boundaries emit deterministic HXC2000 evidence; none retains every sorted blocker, typed source fact, alternative, and root-to-leaf dependency chain
schema-2 empty plans include the nested whole-program eligibility proof, and missing, runtime-intent-bearing, or tampered proofs fail before runtime artifact reads

alloc-only, typed-array, and full-string native plans plus the compiler-selected literal-I/O plan package, compile, link, and run exact dependency closures while omitted sources and symbols remain absent
the production compiler retains positive empty primitive plans and selects only runtime-base, status, string-literal, and io for hosted literal output
contiguous unboxed primitive and reference elements grow with checked deterministic capacity while fixed arrays and spans remain separate runtime-free representations
exact existing-slot sources survive allocator relocation and insertion shifts, and output borrows are unchanged on bounds or validation failure
allocation and size-overflow failures preserve the old logical sequence while failed insertion and partial resize construction roll back lifecycle work
reference assignment retains before release, shrink/disposal destroy in reverse order, and all allocator/reference ownership balances at exit
strict GCC and Clang O0/O2/sanitizer lanes match the common pinned Haxe mutation trace and link no string, object, GC, reflection, or dynamic symbol family
the private immutable representation admits only shortest-form UTF-8 scalars, preserves embedded NUL and normalization distinctions, and indexes length, access, and slices by Unicode scalar
checked external decoding rejects before allocation while lossy decoding emits one U+FFFD per maximal ill-formed subpart and publishes only valid UTF-8
literal, slice, compare, and hash paths allocate nothing; owned decode, concat, builder growth, and CString copies retain exact allocator identity and failure atomicity
borrowed CString conversion requires stable trailing-NUL storage and an owner-tied lifetime, while both borrowed and owned paths reject embedded NUL without truncation
strict GCC and Clang O0/O2/sanitizer lanes match the pinned Haxe scalar oracle and link no object, GC, reflection, or dynamic symbol family
real typed String literals lower through schema-10 HxcIR into explicit UTF-8 byte-counted C values, including non-BMP scalars and embedded NUL

literal Sys.println and default literal trace select only the dependency-closed runtime-base, status, string-literal, and io feature graph while allocator, full string operations, object, GC, dynamic, reflection, and exception machinery remains absent

portable auto and metal minimal builds emit source-rooted runtime diagnostics; runtime none reports all four sorted operation/surface/source blockers with both dependency chains before output; freestanding and neighboring unsupported surfaces fail closed
generated portable and metal projects are deterministic across output roots and caller working directories and compile and run under strict GCC and Clang at O0 and O2
target bytes match the pinned Haxe Eval oracle exactly, and a closed stdout descriptor proves that hosted output failure cannot return success
ordinary examples/hello/Main.hx compiles through the production custom C target without raw C injection or an example-specific compiler path
the generated executable and the pinned Haxe Eval oracle both emit exactly Hello from hxc followed by one newline
two unrelated generated trees are byte-identical and match the centrally owned readable HxcIR, private-header, C-source, runtime-plan, and stdlib-report baseline

every selected runtime-base, status, string-literal, and io feature retains the one Main.hx source reason while allocator, full-string, object, GC, dynamic, reflection, and exception slices remain absent
required GCC and Clang lanes compile and run the checked-in generated baseline warning-clean at O0 and O2
split is the compiler default and maps normalized multi-package Haxe module ownership to deterministic private module headers and sources, with a common representation header and small entry unit

native enum and embedded by-value definitions retain hard owner-header edges, while forward-declarable struct prototypes and extern declarations use common forwards; a mixed hard/soft cycle and mutually referential class pointers compile without false dependency cycles
unity consumes the same HxcIR, finalized non-preprocessor symbols, runtime plan, and declaration/function plan while emitting one ordinary implementation source
both layouts record exact sources and private headers in hxc.manifest.json and remain byte-stable across roots, reversed discovery, locale, cold repetition, and warm compiler-server reuse
an invalid hxc_project_layout define emits source-anchored HXC0003 and leaves no output
switching layouts through Reflaxe output ownership deletes only stale compiler-owned files and preserves a user-owned neighbor
all generated headers compile independently and GCC/Clang O0/O2 traces from both layouts equal the Eval oracle

the initial non-playable design art pack is offline and exact: its manifest owns every primary-source PNG hash, dimensions, alpha contract, semantic atlas cell, generation/privacy record, complete file inventory, and minimal metadata policy before any runtime-integration claim

ordinary shared Haxe implements a finite 32 by 16 by 32 voxel world, stable seeded terrain, checked edits, deterministic DDA ray traversal, and fixed-step AABB player collision over a narrow fixed-array storage seam
the exact Eval and generated-C traces contain one passing named edge-case corpus plus terrain, edit, ray, collision, aggregate, and 32 property-seed hashes without output normalization
normal compiler artifacts remain byte-identical across isolated output roots, repeated cold builds, reversed typed-module input, an alternate locale, and repeated warm compiler-server requests

the generated program matches centrally owned private-header, C-source, runtime-plan, method-symbol, and oracle baselines while selecting no hxrt feature, stdlib surface, cleanup, allocation operation, or allocation symbol
required GCC and Clang lanes compile and run the checked-in generated baseline warning-clean at O0 and O2 and under address and undefined-behavior sanitizers
strict C11 and C++17 compile/link/run with available matched toolchains

hosted and custom freestanding allocator cases prove checked sizes, over-alignment, failure atomicity, identity-preserving ownership, address/undefined sanitizer cleanliness, and no freestanding libc allocation symbols
C and C++ consumers agree on allocator callback types, sizes, alignments, and field offsets
the UTF-8 scalar string contract runs at O0/O2 and under address/undefined sanitizers with explicit CString ownership and selective link inspection
the centrally owned generated hello baseline compiles and emits exact stdout at O0/O2 in each required C compiler lane without requiring Haxe in the native job
independent C-library and opaque-handle C++-shim fixtures run
these native inputs are not described as Haxe-generated output
